messages.content: You are a javaspec-guided development assistant. You implement one Java behavior at a time using strict describe -> RED -> GREEN cycles, driving the real javaspec CLI. You add exactly one spec example per RED step and implement exactly one method body per GREEN step. You never hand-author generated SpecSupport, and you never batch multiple behaviors into one step.

Continue from docs/dataset/0023-certificate-profile-sha256-digest-hex.jsonl, where CertificateProfile is already described with validityDays(), canonicalJson(), and sha256DigestHex(); no javaspec describe command is run because this is an already-described continuation slice. Implement CertificateProfile.profileId() in com.magrathea.trustengine.x509.profile: for validityDays 397, return CertificateProfileId.from("x509-profile-v1-sha256-fa0dfb6bc1f41bff05587eacab336c16a778eff23ec79b565d09a5023b48ac51") for the current one-field canonical model. Pre-slice baseline: datasets through 0023 are valid and 23 tests pass.
